zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前XRP/USD价格围绕1.098附近运行，略低于20日均线1.103，短线呈弱势震荡整理格局，动能偏空短期延续为主。

MACD指标处于零轴下方运行，动能柱继续收缩，空头压力占优但未出现极端放量信号，趋势偏弱阶段性。

短期支撑位关注1.095与1.090区域，下方若跌破或进一步下探；上方阻力在1.103及1.110附近，反弹需放量确认。

操作上建议以区间震荡思路为主，未有效突破前保持观望或轻仓交易，跌破支撑可顺势做空，突破阻力再考虑做多严格止损管理执行纪律。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is currently exhibiting a mild bearish consolidation phase, with price trading just under the short-term SMA(20) at 1.10343. The inability to reclaim this moving average suggests buyers are losing short-term momentum. Price action is compressed near 1.10, indicating indecision after a minor pullback. The day’s tight range between 1.1024 and 1.09818 reflects low volatility, often a precursor to a breakout or continuation of the prevailing drift lower.

Momentum indicators reinforce this cautious tone. The MACD reading at -0.0037 signals weakening bullish pressure and a gradual shift toward bearish dominance, even if the move is not yet aggressive. Without RSI data, price behavior becomes more important, and current structure still favors sellers slightly as the market repeatedly fails to sustain moves above 1.10–1.103. Overall momentum remains soft, lacking strong directional conviction.

Key support is forming at 1.098, which is being tested in real time and currently acting as immediate floor. A decisive break below this level could expose the next support zone around 1.095 and potentially 1.090 if selling accelerates. On the upside, resistance sits at 1.103–1.105, aligned with the SMA(20) and recent intraday highs. This zone will be critical for any bullish recovery attempt.

From a trading perspective, caution is warranted due to compressed volatility and unclear direction. Short-term traders may consider range strategies, selling near resistance and buying near support with tight stops. Breakout traders should wait for confirmation: either a sustained close above 1.105 for bullish continuation or a breakdown below 1.098 for bearish extension. Risk management remains key given the current lack of momentum conviction.
